nasb.text: Now when the captain of the temple guard and the chief priests heard these words, they were greatly perplexed about them as to what would come of this.

esv.text: Now when the captain of the temple and the chief priests heard these words, they were greatly perplexed about them, wondering what this would come to.

cnv.text: 聖殿的守衛長和祭司長聽了這些話，覺得很困惑，不知道這件事將來會怎樣。

ccb.text: 圣殿护卫长和祭司长听后，都很困扰，不知道是怎么回事。

csbs.text: 当圣殿的守卫长和祭司长们听到这些话的时候，就对使徒们的事感到困惑，不知道这事会如何发展。
